data.queryValue:
/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
     ПАРАМЕТРЫ QL-ВИДЖЕТА
     {{interval_from}} : date-interval (начало)
     {{interval_to}}   : date-interval (конец)
     {{month_ago}}     : number   (≥1; сколько месяцев назад брать)
     {{geo_list}}      : string   multi (например: ОАЭ, Бали)
     {{utm_list}}      : string   multi (например: google, yandex)
     {{priority_list}} : string   multi (например: A, B, C) -- не влияет при использовании готового value
  ------------------------------------------------------------------ */

  WITH
    -- 1. Параметры по дате
    date_p AS (
      SELECT
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM {{interval_from}}::DATE)       AS d_from,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM {{interval_to}}::DATE)         AS d_to,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', {{interval_to}}::DATE)      AS cur_month,
        MAKE_INTERVAL(months => {{month_ago}}::INT - 1) AS ago_int
    ),

    -- 2. Разбор multi-select в массив text[]
    list_p AS (
      SELECT
        NULLIF(
          ARRAY(
            SELECT m[1]
            FROM REGEXP_MATCHES(COALESCE($$ {{geo_list}} $$, ''), E'E''([^'']+)''', 'g') AS m
          ),
          ARRAY[]::TEXT[]
        ) AS geo_arr,
        NULLIF(
          ARRAY(
            SELECT m[1]
            FROM REGEXP_MATCHES(COALESCE($$ {{utm_list}} $$, ''), E'E''([^'']+)''', 'g') AS m
          ),
          ARRAY[]::TEXT[]
        ) AS utm_arr,
        NULLIF(
          ARRAY(
            SELECT m[1]
            FROM REGEXP_MATCHES(COALESCE($$ {{priority_list}} $$, ''), E'E''([^'']+)''', 'g') AS m
          ),
          ARRAY[]::TEXT[]
        ) AS pri_arr
    ),

    -- 3. Суточные суммы готового value
    daily AS (
      SELECT
        ps.creation_date::DATE              AS day_date,
        ps.geo                               AS geo,
        ps.utmsource                         AS utmsource,
        SUM(COALESCE(ps.value, 0))::NUMERIC  AS daily_value,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', ps.creation_date)::DATE AS month_start
      FROM mart.perfomance_svodny_actions AS ps
      GROUP BY 1,2,3
    ),

    -- 4. Фильтры по датам и справочникам
    filtered AS (
      SELECT
        d.day_date,
        d.daily_value,
        d.month_start
      FROM daily AS d
      CROSS JOIN date_p AS dp
      CROSS JOIN list_p AS lp
      WHERE
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM d.day_date) BETWEEN dp.d_from AND dp.d_to
        AND d.day_date >= dp.cur_month - dp.ago_int
        AND d.day_date <= {{interval_to}}::DATE
        AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL OR d.geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))
        AND (lp.utm_arr IS NULL OR d.utmsource = ANY(lp.utm_arr))
    ),

    -- 5. Ежемесячная агрегация и расчёт средних/медиан
    monthly_agg AS (
      SELECT
        month_start                              AS month_start,
        TO_CHAR(month_start, 'MM.YYYY')          AS "Месяц периода",
        SUM(daily_value)::NUMERIC                AS "Value",
        AVG(daily_value)::NUMERIC(10,2)          AS "AVG_дневных",
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY daily_value)::NUMERIC(10,2) AS "MED_дневных"
      FROM filtered
      GROUP BY month_start
    ),

    -- 6. Медиана по всем месяцам (медиана месячных итогов)
    overall_median AS (
      SELECT
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Value")::NUMERIC AS "Медиана"
      FROM monthly_agg
    )

  -- 7. Финальный вывод
  SELECT
    ma.month_start,
    ma."Месяц периода",
    ma."Value",
    ma."AVG_дневных",
    ma."MED_дневных",
    om."Медиана"
  FROM monthly_agg AS ma
  CROSS JOIN overall_median AS om
  ORDER BY ma.month_start ASC;
